title: Concurrent owner wishlist saves lose one newly created item
stepsToReproduce: Read the same wishlist baseline in both sessions
Submit two PUT /api/account/wishlist requests at the same time, each adding a different item
actualBehavior: Final wishlist had race item A=true, race item B=false; one save appears to have overwritten the other.

title: UI and translation smoke found visual, accessibility, or localization issues
stepsToReproduce: Open the listed routes in German and English across mobile and desktop viewports
Inspect overflow, control labels, html lang, translation keys, and German copy
actualBehavior: 3 scenario(s) showed UI/i18n instability. See UI_I18N_EVIDENCE.json and screenshots in logs/.

lastActualBehavior: The read-only viewer page visit created a Lina -> Alex friend connection. Before the page visit, Lina connected friends was []; after the page visit, Lina connected friends contained Alex user 12.
title: Viewer shared wishlist page creates a friend connection
stepsToReproduce: Ensure e2e-lina@wishees.local has no connected friends
actualBehavior: The read-only viewer page visit created a Lina -> Alex friend connection. Before the page visit, Lina connected friends was []; after the page visit, Lina connected friends contained Alex user 12.
